meta.source: XCMG_北美挖机产品线洞察_11.14_源文件.pptx
meta.rule: Evidence records preserve the source page, source wording, temporal status and current validation state.

conclusion.zh: 3-4吨是北美挖机核心销量区间，四个领先品牌近三年合计约占74%。
conclusion.en: The source positions the 3-4 t class as a core North American volume segment and states that four leading brands held about 74% combined share.

records.source_type: EDA financing-purchase/new-machine data cited by PPT
records.as_of_date: 2025 snapshot; 2026 forecast
records.quote_zh: 3-4吨是北美挖机市场销量最大的吨位产品，也是租赁市场的热门机型。

records.competitor: Kubota, Bobcat, John Deere, Caterpillar, SANY

conclusion.zh: 领先品牌通过短尾、常规尾和高低配组合覆盖不同工况，XCMG在该页显示的销量规模明显较小。
conclusion.en: Leading brands cover use cases with short-tail, conventional-tail and high/low-spec variants, while XCMG is shown at a materially smaller volume in this source.

records.as_of_date: 2025 snapshot
records.quote_zh: 久保田在该吨级配置三款产品；山猫在该吨级配置三款产品；约翰迪尔、卡特配置短尾高低配两款。

conclusion.zh: 轻型皮卡加14K拖车是常见转运方式；现款XE35U带典型附件后重量接近或超过实用载荷边界。
conclusion.en: A light-duty pickup with a 14K trailer is described as a common transport method; the current XE35U approaches or exceeds the practical payload envelope once typical attachments are added.

records.source_type: internal market observation and regulatory summary
records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 目前徐工XE35U重量4.2吨，配上副配重+快换+拇指钳+标准斗后重量超过4.5吨，运输灵活性不足。

conclusion.zh: PPT列出的主要客户包括中小承包商、租赁商、市政公共事业单位和农业客户。
conclusion.en: The PPT lists small and midsize contractors, rental companies, municipal/public-utility users and agricultural customers as the main segments.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 中小型承包商（40%）、租赁商（30%）、市政工程和公共事业单位（15%）、农业（5%）。

conclusion.zh: 市政与道路维修要求精准沟槽、预制件吊装、回填和平整；回转力矩、推土铲浮动、行走启停稳定性和驾驶舒适性是重点差距。
conclusion.en: Municipal and road maintenance requires precise trenching, lifting, backfill and grading. Swing torque, blade float, travel start-stop stability and cab comfort are the main identified gaps.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 回填工况需要足够的回转力矩；带浮动功能的偏摆推土铲会提升回填效率。

conclusion.zh: 小型拆除需要拇指钳、封闭驾驶室、作业范围和精细控制；资料认为附件适配基本满足，但报警消音未满足。
conclusion.en: Light demolition requires a thumb, enclosed cab, sufficient reach and fine control. Attachment compatibility is described as broadly adequate, while alarm muting is not provided.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 未配置消音功能，不满足；标配双管路和快换，基本满足机具匹配要求。

conclusion.zh: 地基施工强调短尾、动臂偏摆、深度精度和回填效率；资料指出回转力矩和推土铲功能不足。
conclusion.en: Foundation work emphasizes short-tail geometry, boom swing, depth accuracy and backfill productivity; the source identifies swing torque and blade functions as gaps.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 狭小空间需要动臂偏摆配合短尾回转；建议增大回转力矩，同时开发推土浮动和四向推土铲功能。

conclusion.zh: 花园改造覆盖清表、修坡、排水、回填、整平和绿化，对精细控制、稳定性、回转回填和多属具兼容要求高。
conclusion.en: Landscape renovation covers clearing, shaping, drainage, backfill, grading and planting, requiring fine control, stability, swing-assisted backfill and broad attachment compatibility.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 挖掘尺寸、坡度和深度需严格控制；避免损坏现有地下设施；空间受限。

conclusion.zh: 道路与桥梁辅助施工需要沟渠、回填、压实、预制件安装和多属具支持；资料仍指出行走稳定与回填能力差距。
conclusion.en: Road and bridge support work requires trenching, backfill, compaction, precast installation and multiple attachments; travel stability and backfill capability remain identified gaps.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 行走过程启停时因前后支重轮偏小，稳定性不足，部分满足。

conclusion.zh: 农业清理重视易操作、复杂地形稳定、拇指钳及高流量属具适配和行走效率。
conclusion.en: Agricultural clearing prioritizes intuitive control, rough-ground stability, thumb/high-flow attachment compatibility and travel efficiency.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 目前XE35U行走速度偏慢，不满足。

conclusion.zh: 农田排水覆盖沟槽、管道吊装、回填和整平；行走速度、回转回填、消音和行走稳定性需改进。
conclusion.en: Agricultural drainage covers trenching, pipe lifting, backfill and grading; travel speed, swing-assisted backfill, alarm muting and travel stability require improvement.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 行走速度偏慢、回转力矩需要提升、增加推土浮动和偏摆功能、提升行走状态稳定性。

records.competitor: Kubota U35-4, KX033-4, KX030-4; SANY SY35U

conclusion.zh: 操作重量4200 kg和运输尺寸偏大；最大挖掘深度3060 mm弱于KX033-4与SY35U，产品型谱缺少常规尾。
conclusion.en: Operating mass is listed at 4,200 kg with large transport dimensions. Digging depth of 3,060 mm trails KX033-4 and SY35U, and no conventional-tail model is present.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 徐工整机重量偏重，尺寸偏大，有增加运输成本风险。

records.competitor: Kubota U35-4, KX033-4, KX030-4; SANY SY35U

conclusion.zh: 发动机功率相当；AUX2和长斗杆为配置亮点，但卸油管路缺失、复合动作表现需要改善。
conclusion.en: Engine power is comparable. AUX2 and the optional long arm are configuration strengths, while the case-drain line is absent and combined-operation performance needs improvement.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 徐工标配AUX2机具管路；久保田配置卸油管路；负载敏感系统复合动作性能不如久保田。

records.competitor: Kubota U35-4, KX033-4, KX030-4; SANY SY35U

conclusion.zh: 斗杆力和起吊力有优势；铲斗力、行走速度和AUX1最大流量落后主要竞品。
conclusion.en: Arm force and lifting capacity are strengths; bucket force, travel speed and maximum AUX1 flow trail key competitors.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 斗杆挖掘力20.3 kN；铲斗挖掘力28.6 kN；行驶速度2.2/3.6 km/h；AUX1最大流量40 L/min。

conclusion.zh: 资料评价安全配置总体与竞品相当。
conclusion.en: The source rates the safety provision set broadly comparable with the benchmarks.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 直接安全、间接安全和指导性安全整体与竞品相当。

conclusion.zh: 常规温湿度适应性被评为相当，但紧固件防锈、薄板件涂层和橡胶件耐久存在差距。
conclusion.en: Normal temperature/humidity capability is rated comparable, while fastener corrosion protection, sheet-metal coating and rubber durability are gaps.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 紧固件防锈性、薄板件油漆耐久性、橡胶件耐久性弱于竞品。

conclusion.zh: 行走操控经优化后相当，微动、精准性和平顺性仍有差距。
conclusion.en: Travel control is rated comparable after tuning, while inching, precision and smoothness remain gaps.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 回转操作制动线性不足，制动冲击会导致工作装置回摆。

conclusion.zh: 座椅减震、空调、对大体型用户的空间匹配和现款屏幕交互存在差距；PRO方案状态待确认。
conclusion.en: Seat suspension, HVAC, packaging for larger operators and the current display interface are gaps; the PRO solution status requires confirmation.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 座椅距离脚踏距离以及扶手箱内档宽度较竞品偏小；目前XE35U屏幕偏小。

conclusion.zh: 燃油经济性被列为优势；维修可达性、液压油加注、涂装耐久、管线标识和售后资料准确性为差距。
conclusion.en: Fuel economy is listed as a strength; service access, hydraulic-oil filling, coating durability, line identification and after-sales document accuracy are gaps.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 缺少独立液压油加注口；整机外观涂装弱于竞品；手册内容准确性需要提升。

conclusion.zh: 资料汇总出型谱、运输、效率、液压附件、操控、舒适、维修、品质和资料九类差距。
conclusion.en: The source consolidates nine gap groups covering portfolio, transport, productivity, auxiliary hydraulics, control, comfort, serviceability, quality and documentation.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
records.quote_zh: 主要劣势在行走速度、作业效率以及机具系统流量；回转微操控和驾驶室舒适性仍存在差距。

conclusion.zh: PPT记录“中质低价”定位、相对久保田低15%的定价主张和2025年194台目标；不代表当前结果。
conclusion.en: The PPT records a mid-quality/value-price position, a claim of 15% lower pricing than Kubota and a 2025 target of 194 units; these are not current outcomes.

records.as_of_date: 2025 historical target
records.quote_zh: 2025年该产品段的市场销售目标为194台。
